mapper.select: SELECT currency_code, sum( `team_agent_num` ) AS team_agent_num, sum( `direct_report_num` ) AS direct_report_num, sum( `register_user_num` ) AS register_user_num, sum( `first_deposit_num` ) AS first_deposit_num, sum( `first_deposit_rate` ) AS first_deposit_rate, sum( `bet_user_num` ) AS bet_user_num, sum( `bet_amount` ) AS bet_amount, sum( `valid_amount` ) AS valid_amount, sum( `win_loss_amount_user` ) AS win_loss_amount_user, sum( `win_loss_amount_plat` ) AS win_loss_amount_plat, sum( `adjust_amount` ) AS adjust_amount, sum( `win_loss_rate` ) AS win_loss_rate, sum( `activity_amount` ) AS activity_amount, sum( `vip_amount` ) AS vip_amount, sum( `already_use_amount` ) AS already_use_amount, sum( `rebate_amount` ) AS rebateAmount, sum( `deposit_withdraw_fee_amount` ) AS deposit_withdraw_fee_amount, sum( `risk_amount` ) AS risk_amount, sum( `plat_adjust_amount` ) AS plat_adjust_amount, sum( `tips_amount` ) AS tips_amount, sum( `deposit_total_amount` ) AS depositTotalAmount, sum( `withdraw_total_amount` ) AS withdrawTotalAmount from ( select * FROM report_agent_static_day ${ew.customSqlSegment} ) as t group by currency_code
